name: agent-2.1
task: Design n8n memory schema for conversation context. Define the database tables in schema.ts (e.g., ai_memories, memory_links) to store long-term context, timestamps, and entity associations.

name: agent-2.2
task: Create n8n workflow for storing AI interactions. Write the webhook endpoint or n8n node configuration JSON that receives chat logs and inserts them into the ai_memories schema.

name: agent-2.3
task: Build retrieval system for historical context. Implement an endpoint that fetches relevant past memories for a user based on semantic search or timeline to inject into the Claude API prompt.

name: agent-2.4
task: Implement deal history memory for AI continuity. Ensure that every state change in a deal (e.g., status update, document upload) triggers a memory consolidation event so the AI is always aware of the deal's current state.

name: agent-2.5
task: Add relationship memory for network intelligence. Create an automated job or hook that records when two users interact or coinvest, updating a graph relationship memory for the AI to reference.

name: agent-2.6
task: Create scheduled memory consolidation workflow. Write a cron job or n8n workflow that periodically summarizes raw conversation logs into concise, dense memory blocks to save token space in future AI prompts.

name: agent-2.7
task: Build Webhook notifications infrastructure. Create a robust webhook dispatch system in the server that can send HTTP POST requests to registered external URLs upon key events (deal closed, KYC approved).

name: agent-2.8
task: Add real e-signature integration placeholder/logic. Implement the service layer (e.g., services/docusign.ts) with stubbed out API calls for generating envelopes and receiving signed callbacks.

name: agent-2.9
task: Build external API integration framework for sanctions databases. Create a service module that takes a user's name/details and queries a simulated or actual sanctions API, flagging the user if a match occurs.

name: agent-2.10
task: Scaffold white-label customization framework. Add support for custom branding (colors, logos) per tenant/SPV by loading CSS variables dynamically from the database.
